text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
Up next, we have the latest news from the
Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
First up is Mejiro Dober, a promising rookie from
the Mejiro family, who showed up strong in last
year's Hanshin J.F.!

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
Her fans have high expectations for her in the
Tiara tour...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since the start of the year, Mejiro Dober has
been drawing far more enthusiastic attention from
the public than I had anticipated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I worry whether this attention will be a good or
bad thing, as I head to the academy to talk with
her about the coming year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the training course, I see Mejiro Dober and
Mejiro Bright warming up together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Happy New Year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, Dober's trainer! Happy New Year!
choice_data_list: Happy New Year to the both of you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, Dober's trainer! Happy New Year!
choice_data_list: Happy New Year to the both of you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Here's to another year together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. I'm looking forward to working with you
again this year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Let's all make this year a wonderful one!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Let's all make this year a wonderful one!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Oh! Look, it's Mejiro Dober!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: And she's with Mejiro Bright! How lucky are we?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What's going on?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before we know what's happening, a large group
of reporters starts rushing toward us!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh goodness. Are you here for an interview?
There sure are a lot of you!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Mejiro Dober! Could you tell us about
your plans for your classic year?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Since you ran in the Hanshin J.F., does that mean
you'll be aiming for the Tiara tour? It's become a
hot topic among your fans!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Is it true that you and Mejiro Bright are secretly
training together for your classic year?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Please give us all the details!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Uh...
choice_data_list: I'll take all your questions for now.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: We'd prefer to hear from Mejiro Dober herself!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Please, Miss Dober! Your fans would love to hear
what you have to—
choice_data_list: Please direct all inquiries through me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: But the world is longing to hear from her directly!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear! My goodness, I seem to have forgotten
something of mine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Come with me, Dober! Keep me company while I
go fetch it.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wait! Please come back!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'm afraid I must take her with me. I'm so
airheaded that I'll likely forget more of my things
without Dober to accompany me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Isn't that right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh... Uh, y-yeah.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Thanks for that, Bright. And, uh... you too, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Thanks for that, Bright. And thank you too, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Whatever do you mean? I only asked you to come
with me to retrieve a forgotten item.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Whatever do you mean? I only asked you to come
with me to retrieve a forgotten item.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...You don't have to play dumb. If you actually
forgot something, how come you're
empty-handed?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well, actually, I seem to have forgotten what it
was I had forgotten! ♪ What an airhead I am!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: If you say so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Still, why were there so many reporters around?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Nothing like that has ever happened before...
choice_data_list: It's proof of how many eyes are on you.
It's proof of how many eyes are on you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...On me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It's only natural after your performance in the
Hanshin J.F.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: With how exceptionally well you've been doing, it'd be difficult not to attract attention.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I don't know about that, but... are things going to
be like this forever?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Well, who can say?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
But I'm sure your trainer will make it abundantly
clear that unauthorized interviews are not
welcome.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Isn't that right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: R-right...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober seems a bit discombobulated after
all that. Maybe she could do with a good change
of pace.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since it's New Year's, I suggest a
holiday-appropriate activity.
choice_data_list: Let's do some New Year's calligraphy!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What?! Where'd that come from?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What's gotten into you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Karuta? That sounds lovely! The perfect
New Year's activity!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Karuta? That sounds lovely! The perfect
New Year's activity!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Not you too, Bright! We still have to train!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
How nostalgic! We used to play karuta all
together as a family, and Dober would cry
because she couldn't get any cards.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
H-hey! That was back when I was practically a
baby!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Last year, I did way better than you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, did you? Last year was so long ago. I
hardly remember how things went.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Grr... You're the one who brought up ancient
history!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I suppose we'll just have to decide who's better
with a rematch, then. Let's get started, Dober!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ugh, fine... I'll play if you want to that badly!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Okay, let's have your trainer read the
poems for us.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I won't lose!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the end of the day, Mejiro Dober ends up in a
much better mood.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? Talk about sudden...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! Mochi soup! What a wonderful suggestion,
and a timely one too! I was just starting to feel
peckish.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Time to eat some stretchy, stretchy mochi! Hehe!
What a happy thought.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I thought we were going to train, thou—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
We should hurry and buy the ingredients. Let's
see, for traditional mochi soup, we'll need...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: What kind of vegetables are in it again? Celery?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ugh! Stop it right there, Bright! I'll help make it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And you! Don't just stand there. This was your
idea, so make yourself useful!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm not too confident in my cooking skills,
though, so can you help us too, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I help the two of them make Mejiro-style mochi
soup, and we all eat it together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I help the two of them make Mejiro-style mochi
soup, and we all eat it together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only does Mejiro Dober's mood improve, I
also get to learn about Mejiro-style cooking, so
it's a good start to the new year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
N-New Year's calligraphy? What a random
suggestion...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
N-New Year's calligraphy? We weren't even
talking about that, though...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what a marvelous idea! I haven't done mine
yet!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what a marvelous idea! I haven't done mine
yet!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we take this opportunity to write our
resolutions for the year, Dober?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure putting them on paper will motivate us
even more in training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I guess we can do that... It'll be embarrassing to
write them together, though. My calligraphy's not
so great...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
What's important is the feeling behind your
words, not the neatness. Just pour your heart into
the brush strokes, and all will be fine!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Let's get started right away! Your trainer should
join us too. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of us write our goals for the classic year
and show them to each other!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober seems focused, and I sense
ambition in the letters she pens: "Triple Tiara."
